title: Smoked Turkey Burger à la Française
description: A French-inspired twist on the classic turkey burger, featuring decadent flavors and a smoky twist.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the smoked turkey burgers with salt and pepper.
Grill the burgers for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the brioche buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Spread a layer of Dijon mustard on the bottom bun.
Add a slice of Brie cheese, a few leaves of arugula, and a spoonful of caramelized onions.
Place a cooked turkey burger on top.
Drizzle with honey and top with the top bun.
